supersedes: ad-hoc internal/certified pairs in audit markdown without latest.json

internalReadiness.label: Internal Readiness
internalReadiness.description: Repo-controlled engineering + structural ops evidence. Moves only via ledger dimension updates or CI penalty deltas.

certifiedReadiness.label: Certified Readiness
certifiedReadiness.description: What an auditor/regulator can trust today. CR = IR − externalAssuranceGap (capped 0–2.0).

dimensions.description: Tests, coverage gates, type safety, gateway/replay hardening
CI truth, formatting, docs, README accuracy
Auth boundaries, policies, dependency audit, Kyverno
SIGNAL, eval pipeline, agent gates (not raw SIGNAL alone)
DR/WORM/release evidence — structural vs live operator proof

externalAssurancePenalties.label: Recurring WORM upload on main merge

supplementaryMetrics.label: SIGNAL scorecard
supplementaryMetrics.note: Report separately; do not substitute for agenticMaturity or IR.

supplementaryMetrics.label: Core weighted (retired)
supplementaryMetrics.note: Do not cite in new audits. Historical only.

rules: Only two headline scores: IR and CR.
Full audits MUST run node tools/scripts/compute-audit-scores.mjs and paste the Scorecard block.
Phase audits use Strong/Good/Pass — no ad-hoc X/10 unless mapped to a dimension change in the ledger.
Sprint plans use qualitative impact, not projected IR/CR trajectories.
Score changes require an append-only ledger history entry with commit + artifact.
